basic_details.job_title: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026: 44 Vacancies, Stipend, Apply on NAPS Portal
basic_details.post_name: CNCI 2nd Campus, Street No. 299, Plot No. DJ-01, Premises No. 02-0321, Action Area ID, New Town, Kolkata – 700160
basic_details.short_information: The Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI), Kolkata has invited applications for 10 different apprenticeship programs at its 2nd Campus in New Town, Kolkata. The recruitment is issued vide Advertisement No. N/022/2026 dated 13.07.2026, offering a total of 44 apprenticeship vacancies across posts such as Deputy Duty Manager, General Duty Assistant, Medical Laboratory Technician, Patient Counsellor, Operation Theatre Technician, Emergency Care Assistant, Medical Records Assistant and Frontline Healthcare Associate. Eligible candidates must apply through the National Apprenticeship Promoti

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement (i.e. on or about 03.08.2026, based on the 21-day window stated in the notification - candidates should verify the exact closing date on the NAPS portal)
important_dates.exam_date: Not yet released. To be notified in due course on the CNCI website

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for these apprenticeship programs. This is Not specified in the official notification, and candidates should check the NAPS portal for any portal-related charges, if applicable, at the time of registration.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 12th Science with Physics, Chemistry and Biology
Graduate - B.Sc. Science, Nutrition & Dietetics Graduate
12th Humanities / 12th Science / Diploma in OT Technician
12th Science with Physics, Chemistry and Biology

qualification.details: Age limit, nationality/domicile requirements, and category-wise reservation details are Not specified in this notification.

salary_details.details: Deputy Duty Manager: ₹9,600/month General Duty Assistant V3: ₹8,200/month Dental Laboratory Technician: ₹8,200/month Medical Laboratory Technician (Radiology): ₹9,600/month Patient Counsellor: ₹12,300/month Operation Theatre Technician: ₹9,600/month Medical Laboratory Technician (Pathology): ₹9,600/month Emergency Care Assistant: ₹8,200/month Medical Records Assistant: ₹9,600/month Frontline Healthcare Associate: ₹9,600/month

selection_process: The notification states that the selection process will involve Document Verification
and Interview. The detailed schedule for these stages will be notified in due course
and candidates are advised to regularly check the official CNCI website for updates. Further details on the exact selection methodology (weightage
cut-offs) are Not specified in the notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/.
Register on the portal, if not already registered.
Search for CNCI, Kolkata, and select the relevant apprenticeship course/program you wish to apply for from the list of 10 programs notified.
Fill in the application form with accurate personal, educational and contact details.
Regularly check the official CNCI website for updates on the schedule of document verification, written examination and interview.

No. N/022/2026, dated 13.07.2026) issued by the Director, CNCI, Kolkata, before applying, as it lists the complete post-wise qualification and stipend details for each apprenticeship program. content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: The notification states the application window as "within 21 days from the date of publication," without giving an exact calendar closing date. The date shown above (03.08.2026) is a straightforward day-count from the publication date and is provided only for convenience - candidates must confirm the exact last date on the official NAPS portal before applying.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Stipend
content_sections.text: Deputy Duty Manager: ₹9,600/month General Duty Assistant V3: ₹8,200/month Dental Laboratory Technician: ₹8,200/month Medical Laboratory Technician (Radiology): ₹9,600/month Patient Counsellor: ₹12,300/month Operation Theatre Technician: ₹9,600/month Medical Laboratory Technician (Pathology): ₹9,600/month Emergency Care Assistant: ₹8,200/month Medical Records Assistant: ₹9,600/month Frontline Healthcare Associate: ₹9,600/month

content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Application Fee
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention any application fee for these apprenticeship programs. This is Not specified in the official notification, and candidates should check the NAPS portal for any portal-related charges, if applicable, at the time of registration.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification states that the selection process will involve Document Verification, Written Examination, and Interview . The detailed schedule for these stages will be notified in due course, and candidates are advised to regularly check the official CNCI website for updates. Further details on the exact selection methodology (weightage, marks, cut-offs) are Not specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Required Documents
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify a detailed list of documents required at the time of application or document verification. Candidates are generally expected to keep their educational certificates, mark sheets and identity proof ready, but the exact document checklist is Not specified in this notification - candidates should refer to the NAPS portal and the CNCI website for further instructions.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ . Register on the portal, if not already registered. Search for CNCI, Kolkata, and select the relevant apprenticeship course/program you wish to apply for from the list of 10 programs notified. Fill in the application form with accurate personal, educational and contact details. Submit the application within (13.07.2026). Regularly check the official CNCI website for updates on the schedule of document verification, written examination and interview.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 44 vacancies are notified across 10 apprenticeship programs, including Deputy Duty Manager (8), Frontline Healthcare Associate (10), Emergency Care Assistant (6), General Duty Assistant V3 (4), Patient Counsellor (4), Medical Laboratory Technician Pathology (4), Medical Records Assistant (4), Operation Theatre Technician (2), Dental Laboratory Technician (1), and Medical Laboratory Technician Radiology (1).

faq.question: Q2. How to apply for CNCI Kolkata apprenticeship posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must register and apply through the NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/, selecting the relevant apprenticeship course.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification states that applications must be submitted within 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement, which is dated 13.07.2026. An exact calendar last date is not stated in the notification — candidates should verify this on the NAPS portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for the Deputy Duty Manager apprenticeship at CNCI?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a graduate or pursuing any graduate degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for CNCI apprenticeship programs?
faq.answer: The stipend varies by program, ranging from ₹8,200/month (General Duty Assistant V3, Dental Laboratory Technician, Emergency Care Assistant) to ₹12,300/month (Patient Counsellor). Most technician-level programs offer ₹9,600/month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the tenure of the CNCI apprenticeship programs?
faq.answer: Tenure varies by program: 365 days (Deputy Duty Manager, General Duty Assistant V3, Patient Counsellor, Emergency Care Assistant, Medical Records Assistant), 270 days (Frontline Healthcare Associate), 180 days (Operation Theatre Technician), 15 months (Medical Laboratory Technician – Radiology and Pathology), and 37 months (Dental Laboratory Technician).

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for CNCI Kolkata Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention any application fee. This is Not specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CNCI apprenticeship posts?
faq.answer: Selection involves Document Verification, Written Examination, and Interview. The exact schedule will be notified later on the CNCI website.
